page_content:
Formerly: EDPL636.

EDPS663 Policy Formulation in Education (3-6 Credits)

Various levels of school governance. Analysis of policy formation, administration and evaluation issues.

Restriction: Permission of EDUC-Teaching, Learning, Policy and Leadership department.

Credit Only Granted for. EDHI663, EDPL663, or EDPS663. Formerly: EDPL663.

EDPS712 Analysis of Educational Concepts (3 Credits) Analyses of selected concepts used in thinking about education. Credit Only Granted for. EDHI712, EDPL712, or EDPS712. Formerly: EDPL712.
